name: GT-jb-axiom-sq
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:2314-2316 (3.1.4, JB axioms), VERBATIM: "A JB algebra is a Jordan Banach algebra A in which the norm satisfies the following two additional conditions for  $a, b \in A$ : (i)  $||a^2|| = ||a||^2$ , (ii)  $||a^2|| \le ||a^2 + b^2||$ ." Applied to V=B(H)_sa: ||r^2||=||r||^2 for r=r^* in V.
